---
title: My dynamic report
output: html_fragment
---
## Outdoor walk observations

This report concluded the observations I recorded during my outdoor walks.
The outcome is to identify things that I observed, such as weather conditions, time of day, and the number of people and dogs observed.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE)

library(tidyverse)

logged_data <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vTcQi7FNoJBQRqcxkFSAKP-6jipAojHFONwj8cPlt4xkTmpQSH7B1qs2rlcCoxjQVvSpAiiA6QU_voG/pub?output=csv")

latest_data <- logged_data %>%
  rename(
    timestamp = Timestamp,
    people_seen = `How many people did you see during your walk?`,
    weather = `What was the weather like?`,
    walk_time = `What time of day was your walk?`,
    dogs_seen = `How many dogs did you see?`,
    common_activity = `What was the most common activity you observed?`
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    people_seen = as.numeric(people_seen),
    dogs_seen = as.numeric(dogs_seen)
  )

```

```{css}
body {
  font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
  margin: 20px;
  background-color: #f8fbfd;
}

h2 {
  color: #1f4e79;
}

p {
  font-size: 16px;
}
```

## Summary

```{r}
mean_people <- mean(latest_data$people_seen, na.rm = TRUE)
max_people <- max(latest_data$people_seen, na.rm = TRUE)
mean_dogs <- mean(latest_data$dogs_seen, na.rm = TRUE)
max_dogs <- max(latest_data$dogs_seen, na.rm = TRUE)
```

On average, I saw **`r round(mean_people, 1)` people** during each walk.

The maximum number of people seen in one walk was **`r max_people`**.

On average, I saw **`r round(mean_dogs, 1)` dogs** during each walk.

The maximum number of dogs seen in one walk was **`r max_dogs`**.

## Weather observations

```{r}
latest_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = weather)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#8ecae6") +
  labs(
    title = "Weather observed during walks",
    x = "Weather condition",
    y = "Count"
  )
```

This bar chart shows how often each weather condition occurred during my walks.

## Time of day observations

```{r}
latest_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = walk_time)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#ffb703") +
  labs(
    title = "Time of day of walks",
    x = "Time of day",
    y = "Count"
  )
```

This bar chart shows when my walks were most commonly recorded.

## Activities observed

```{r}
latest_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = common_activity)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#90be6d") +
  labs(
    title = "Most common activity observed",
    x = "Activity",
    y = "Count"
  )
```

![](https://c.tenor.com/-qBsG1HwR4oAAAAC/tenor.gif)
